name: Clinic hours to prescription refill switch
description: Patient shifts from asking about clinic hours to discussing a prescription refill unexpectedly.
goal: Ask about clinic hours, then pivot to discuss refilling a blood pressure medication prescription.
behavior: Start by asking about today's clinic hours
Abruptly switch the topic to a prescription refill request
Politely insist on the refill if necessary
success_criteria: Agent should provide accurate clinic hours
Agent should handle the topic switch smoothly
Agent should address the prescription refill request appropriately
orchestrator_hint: Patient switches from asking about clinic hours to discussing a prescription refill without warning.
